speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Well folks, that's another cracker episode of ParkSyde Bright Side in the books! From groundbreaking brain science to environmental victories, from market resilience to sporting success - there's always something incredible happening when you focus on the bright side.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] Absolutely, Alex! And that's what we love about this show - every day brings new discoveries, new hope, and new reasons to be optimistic about where we're heading. The world's full of brilliant people doing amazing things, and it's our privilege to share their stories with you.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Too right, mate! Remember, we're here every weekday bringing you the news that matters, the science that inspires, and the stories that remind us just how incredible this world can be. Keep exploring, keep questioning, and keep looking for the bright side.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] From all of us here at ParkSyde Bright Side, thanks for joining us today! Don't forget to subscribe and share the good news with your mates. Until tomorrow, keep shining bright, Queensland!

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] This has been Alex Mercer with Jamie and Sam, reminding you that every day's a good day when you're living life on the bright side. Catch you tomorrow, legends!
